display.purpose: Dashboard stat values — episodes watched, hours, score totals. Always monospace. Never used for UI labels or headings.

headline.purpose: One per screen. Main page title in the content header. Bold sans.

title.purpose: Card headings, sidebar panel labels, logo wordmark. SemiBold sans.

body.purpose: Row subtitles, metadata, input text, tooltip prose. Regular sans.

label.purpose: Short uppercase identifiers: status badges, column headers, section eyebrows. SemiBold, 4 words max.

shadows.name: subtle-lift
shadows.purpose: Sidebar filter panels, small containers. Barely perceptible separation from background.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: In Progress media cards on pointer-over. Paired with -2px translateY for physical lift effect.

shadows.name: metric-card
shadows.purpose: Dashboard stat metric cards. Static; no animation. Slight separation without hover feedback.

motion.name: swift
motion.purpose: Button press scale (0.95), card hover transform. Immediate, tactile response.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: TextBox border and background on focus. Color/brush transitions on interactive elements.

motion.name: brush
motion.purpose: Nav icon foreground brush change on selection.

motion.name: slide
motion.purpose: Navigation sliding highlight (Y-axis translate). The signature animation of the nav system.

motion.name: fade
motion.purpose: ScrollBar opacity fade (0.4 to 0.9 on hover).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Used for Add to list, Search, Save changes.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #9B6EF8; color: #EDE9FF; border: 1px solid #9B6EF8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 7px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transform-origin: center; transition: background 140ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #C8B8FF; border-color: #C8B8FF; color: #100B1B; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Used for Refresh, Back, filter selections, view toggles.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #A99EC0; border: 1px solid #2C2244; border-radius: 8px; padding: 7px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transform-origin: center; transition: background 140ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #1A1628; border-color: #9B6EF8; color: #EDE9FF; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action button. Remove from library, Drop. Never used for non-destructive actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: transparent; color: #6B6080; border: 1px solid #2C2244; border-radius: 8px; padding: 7px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 140ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #3F1515; border-color: #EF4444; color: #EF4444; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: 34px text input with inline search icon. Focus shifts border to Murakami Violet and lifts background.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; left: 10px; pointer-events: none; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-input { width: 280px; height: 34px; background: #1A1628; border: 1px solid #2C2244; border-radius: 9px; color: #EDE9FF; font-size: 13px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0 12px 0 32px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B6080; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #9B6EF8; background: #201C30; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Vertical nav with icon box + two-line label. Selected item gets violet-glow backing and accent border.
components.html:
Home
Dashboard
Discover
Browse titles
Library
Your list
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 12px; background: #120F1C; width: 220px; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: 50px; border-radius: 12px; padding: 0 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-item--selected { background: #9B6EF848; border: 1px solid #9B6EF8; } .ds-nav-item:not(.ds-nav-item--selected):hover { background: #271F38; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 34px; height: 34px; background: #1A1628; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-item--selected .ds-nav-icon { background: #9B6EF82E; } .ds-nav-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #EDE9FF; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-sub { font-size: 10px; color: #6B6080; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

components.name: Media Card (Grid)
components.description: 172x262px grid card for Library and Continue Watching. Poster image, info strip, action buttons.
components.html:
Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
Watching9.0
EP 7 / 28
components.css: .ds-media-card { width: 172px; background: #1A1628; border: 1px solid #2C2244; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-media-card__poster { height: 154px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #38215F 0%, #10131F 100%); position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-media-card__play { pointer-events: none; } .ds-media-card__plus { position: absolute; right: 8px; bottom: 8px; width: 30px; height: 30px; background: #9B6EF8; border: none; border-radius: 8px; color: #EDE9FF; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: background 140ms; } .ds-media-card__plus:hover { background: #C8B8FF; color: #100B1B; } .ds-media-card__info { padding: 10px 12px 0; } .ds-media-card__title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #EDE9FF; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-media-card__row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 3px; } .ds-media-card__status { font-size: 11px; color: #9B6EF8; } .ds-media-card__score { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #F59E0B; font-family: 'Cascadia Code', monospace; } .ds-media-card__progress { font-size: 11px; color: #22D3EE; font-family: 'Cascadia Code', monospace; } .ds-media-card__actions { display: flex; gap: 5px; padding: 8px 12px 12px; } .ds-media-card__btn { width: 30px; height: 28px; background: #9B6EF8; border: none; border-radius: 8px; color: #EDE9FF; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: background 140ms; } .ds-media-card__btn:hover { background: #C8B8FF; color: #100B1B; } .ds-media-card__btn--danger { background: transparent; border: 1px solid #2C2244; color: #6B6080; } .ds-media-card__btn--danger:hover { background: #3F1515; border-color: #EF4444; color: #EF4444; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Inline status chip. Color is semantic per status. Text label always present alongside color.
components.html: WatchingCompletedPlanningPausedDropped
components.css: .ds-badge-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-badge { height: 22px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #201C30; border: 1px solid #2C2244; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-badge--watching { color: #9B6EF8; } .ds-badge--completed { color: #10B981; } .ds-badge--planning { color: #22D3EE; } .ds-badge--paused { color: #F59E0B; } .ds-badge--dropped { color: #EF4444; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: 3px vertical color bar + uppercase Label text. Bar color matches the section's semantic signal hue.
components.html:
IN PROGRESS
AIRING TODAY
RECENTLY UPDATED
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-section-bar { width: 3px; height: 13px; border-radius: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-section-text { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

narrative.overview:
TanaHub is a precision instrument for cataloguing a library of consumed media. The visual system treats the act of tracking as deliberate and exacting. The palette is deep indigo-black: the darkness of a room where someone is watching something that matters. Against it, Murakami Violet marks what is active. Season Cyan threads through progress data. Sakura Signal surfaces the broadcast schedule. Every accent earns its place by carrying information.

The system rejects decoration for its own sake. The engineering story IS the brand: native Skia rendering, not Electron; .NET concurrency, not JavaScript timers. Surfaces are flat, crisp, and layered tonally. Transitions are short (120-220ms), easing out of state changes with CubicEaseOut, never choreographed for show.

The app is domain-literate. Status labels read "Watching" and "Plan to Watch". Progress displays as "EP 7/12". The observatory knows what a cour is, and the interface proves it without stating it.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black indigo backgrounds with a 5-step tonal surface ramp
One primary accent (Murakami Violet) deployed at no more than 15% of any surface
Three semantic secondary hues: cyan for progress data, sakura for schedule/airing, amber for scores
Monospace font stack exclusively for numeric values (scores, episode counts, timestamps)
Flat tonal elevation; shadows function as a lift of 7-16% opacity black, not structural
State transitions: 120-220ms, CubicEaseOut, transform + brush only

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Murakami Violet appears on no more than 15% of any screen. Restraint is precision. A surface where violet is everywhere is a surface where nothing is active.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Each secondary hue carries exactly one semantic meaning: cyan = progress, sakura = schedule/airing, amber = score. Reassigning these hues breaks the visual grammar.

rules.name: The Mono Signal Rule
rules.body: Every numeric data value renders in the monospace stack. The mono stack is a semantic choice, not a decorative one.

rules.name: The Scale Minimum Rule
rules.body: No text appears below 10px. Star Smoke at 10px is at the WCAG AA contrast floor. Use Dusk Lavender for any 10px text that carries information.

rules.name: The Tonal Lift Rule
rules.body: Elevation is expressed by the surface ramp, confirmed by shadow. Never use shadow alone. A card on Observatory Shell uses Raised Panel as its background, not shell + heavy shadow.

rules.name: The No-Blur Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter: blur is prohibited as a default elevation technique. The system has no glassmorphism.

dos: Do use the monospace stack on every numeric value: scores, episode counts, chapter numbers, timestamps, stats displays.
Do step the surface ramp to express elevation: backgrounds on Observatory Shell, cards on Raised Panel, focused inputs on Elevated Card.
Do use semantic status colors consistently: cyan = progress, sakura = schedule/airing, amber = score.
Do pair every color-coded status with a text label. Color alone is insufficient.
Do apply CubicEaseOut to all transitions, 120-220ms. Nothing eases in or bounces.
Do use Ghost buttons for secondary actions and primary buttons for the single primary action per screen.
Do use domain vocabulary: Watching, Plan to Watch, EP 7/12, Airing Today.
Do verify WCAG AA contrast at each text tier before adding new text styles.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill). Prohibited.
Don't make this look like generic SaaS dark mode: no navy sidebars, no teal accents, no flat card grids with identical icon + heading + text.
Don't imitate Electron anime apps (Taiga, Shiru): no slow transitions, no inconsistent component vocabulary, no browser-default form controls.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on list rows or cards. Do not extend the 3px left-column Border pattern to new components.
Don't add a third font family. The system has UI sans and mono. Nothing else.
Don't use heavy shadows (black opacity above 20%). System ceiling is 16% opacity.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, margin, padding). Only transform, opacity, and brush transitions.
Don't apply Murakami Violet to more than 15% of any screen surface.
Don't use backdrop-filter blur as elevation.
Don't put Bold 700 type at 26px+ in more than one heading per screen.
